TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Raditya_Adi, title = Raditya_Adi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Raditya_Adi} }

S.FORM: Si Raditya Adi (nianak nen 4 Agosto 2000) et sakey ya Indonesian ya rapper, managsulat na kansion tan managgaway plaka. Ginmapo si Raditya Adi ed karera to ed musika nen 2022 diad impaway to so sankaunaan ya single to ya say titulo to et "Orang Miskin". cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' tvonenews.com

Si Raditya Adi (nianak nen 4 Agosto 2000) et sakey ya Indonesian ya rapper, managsulat na kansion tan managgaway plaka. Ginmapo si Raditya Adi ed karera to ed musika nen 2022 diad impaway to so sankaunaan ya single to ya say titulo to et "Orang Miskin". cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' tvonenews.com
S.PHON: s~ɕi ra*itja a*i (nianak nen * aɣos~ɕto ****) et s~ɕakej ja in*ones~ɕian ja rapper, manaɣs~ɕulat na kans~ɕion tan manaɣɣawaj plaka. ɣinmapo s~ɕi ra*itja a*i e* karera to e* mus~ɕika nen **** *ia* impawaj to s~ɕo s~ɕankaunaan ja s~ɕiŋle to ja s~ɕaj titulo to et "oraŋ mis~ɕkin". ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ t*onenews~ɕ.ʦ~ʨom
